title: Montachusett Regional Vocational Technical School District ransomware incident

victim.name: Montachusett Regional Vocational Technical School District

extortion.description: Montachusett Regional Vocational Technical School, also known as Monty Tech, is a grade 9 (age 14–15) to grade 12 (age 17–18) public, secondary, vocational, open enrollment school in Fitchburg and Westminster, Massachusetts, United States.
